support_leak_findings: External delivery is guarded twice: reporter filters external sink refs for non-real roots in emit_building_event_for_policy, and report_sinks blocks Slack/dashboard when packet.external_delivery_allowed is not True.
Local inbox writes are still sink behavior under report_sinks; direct temp-root delivery was not executed because the sandbox cannot write temp or repo files.
